$schema: Design system SAFE LegalTech — single source of truth from reference images

brand.voice: Clear, confident, no clutter. Generous whitespace. Hierarchy over density.

logo.description: Shield with scales of justice; green outline, gold balance, gradient A accent
logo.usage: Primary green + gold accent only on key UI (e.g. letter A or CTA)

primary.usage: Sidebar bg, active nav, primary buttons, charts, positive states, trust balance hero

secondary.usage: Unpaid invoices card, Savings button, chart gradients, accents, logo balance

typography.rules: Titles and KPIs: bold/large. Section titles: semi-bold medium. Body: regular. Secondary: smaller, lighter. No decorative fonts.

glass.rules: backdrop-filter for blur; subtle top/left highlight border; optional very light noise texture; avoid heavy opacity.

buttons.primary: bg-primary-green-800 text-white rounded-md hover:bg-primary-green-700 active:scale-[0.98] transition shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary-gold-500 text-white rounded-md hover:bg-secondary-gold-400 transition shadow-sm

inputs.base: rounded-md border border-neutral-border bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-sm text-primary placeholder:text-neutral-muted focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-green-500/30 focus:border-primary-green-500

cards.standard: rounded-md bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/50 shadow-md overflow-hidden
cards.glass: rounded-md bg-white/72 backdrop-blur-[12px] border border-white/40 shadow-glass
cards.kpi: rounded-md bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/50 shadow-md
cards.hero: rounded-md overflow-hidden; gradient background with glass overlay; inner shadow for depth

sidebar.navItem: rounded-md px-3 py-2; active: bg-primary-green-700/90 text-white; inactive: text-white/80 hover:bg-white/10

tables.header: sticky top-0 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-sm border-b font-medium text-left text-bodySmall

badges.default: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-caption font-medium bg-neutral-surface text-neutral-secondary

onboarding.hero: Large title (display), soft gradient bg (green–gold), generous padding, single CTA
onboarding.featureCards: White/glass cards, icon in green circle, title bold green, description muted, checkmark gold
onboarding.stepper: 3 dots: active = primary green filled, inactive = neutral border
onboarding.cta: Get Started > — primary green button, chevron, shadow

accessibility.focusVisible: Always show focus ring for keyboard (primary-green-500/30)

responsive.sidebar: Collapse to drawer on md down; show full on lg+
responsive.grid: 1 col mobile, 2 col tablet, 3–4 col desktop for KPIs and cards
